description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a dark gray gable roof and two visible chimneys. The exterior walls are primarily white with a stone or brick base trim, and the front features a covered porch supported by columns. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light inside. The entryway is centrally located and accessed by a paved walkway that extends from the street to the porch. The property is surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn, bordered by paved paths on three sides. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on simplicity and comfort.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a dark gable roof, stone trim, and a covered front porch, surrounded by a green lawn and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical windows flanking the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable end, roof overhang, and absence of windows on this facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entrance or patio area and fewer windows, plus visible stone trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end with a decorative element and a single window.
